---
title: "2009 Colombian Stata Users Group meeting embedded within the First International Workshop on Applied Statistics"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2009-10-27"
categories:
  - "Software"
  - "Community and Events"
---

# http://stata.com/meeting/colombia09/

### Announcement

The first Colombian Stata Users Group meeting will be embedded within the Universidad Santo Tomas' "[First International Workshop on Applied Statistics](2009-10-09-first-international-workshop-on-applied-statistics-bogota-colombia.qmd)". During the conference, we will have four Stata presentations plus a Stata Press books presentation and one basic 16-hour Stata training.

Stata users from all disciplines are invited to attend.

**Registration**

The meeting is free to those registered for the

[First International Workshop on Applied Statistics](2009-10-09-first-international-workshop-on-applied-statistics-bogota-colombia.qmd)

.

### Organizers

The meeting is organized by

[SOFTWARE shop](http://www.software-shop.com/)

, the distributor of Stata in Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. To view proceedings from previous Stata Users Group meetings, visit

# [**www.stata.com/meeting/proceedings.html.**](http://www.stata.com/meeting/proceedings.html)
